stemHtml:
The cabin altitude of a pressurised aeroplane reaches 14 000 ft. Which of the following statements about the oxygen system is correct?

1. The passenger oxygen mask can ONLY be activated manually
2. The oxygen mask will be released automatically
3. The passenger oxygen mask can be activated manually
4. The oxygen flow starts automatically upon falling of the mask
5. You have to pull the mask to your face to start the flow of oxygen
